zh.Mitteleuropa, Europa: 艾歐洛特拉爾 艾歐洛
zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite Marie De Peronne於1056年出生在法國皮卡迪索姆培洛時，她的父親Robert I de Peronne de Senlis31歲，母親Alix de Flandres28歲。她於1079年與Gérard de Vermandois I de Heure Lord of Ham結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1121年在法國皮卡迪索姆漢姆享年65歲。

zh-hans.Mitteleuropa, Europa: 艾歐洛特拉爾 艾歐洛
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite Marie De Peronne于1056年出生在法国皮卡迪索姆培洛时，她的父亲Robert I de Peronne de Senlis31岁，母亲Alix de Flandres28岁。她于1079年与Gérard de Vermandois I de Heure Lord of Ham结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1121年在法国皮卡迪索姆漢姆享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Peronne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Pasquale, Angelo, Deno, Dino, Francesco, Orazio, Vito.
Italian: from an augmentative of the personal name   Pero  .

variants.name: Pero
meanings: Italian: from the personal name Pero, a variant of Piero ‘Peter’ (see Pieri ).
Galician: from the personal name Pero, Galician equivalent of Peter .
Portuguese: habitational name from any of the places called Pero.

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite Marie De Peronne was born in 1056, in Péronne, Somme, Picardie, France, her father, Robert I de Peronne de Senlis, was 31 and her mother, Alix de Flandres, was 28. She married Gérard de Vermandois I de Heure Lord of Ham in 1079. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1121, in Ham, Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite Marie De Peronne est née en 1056, à Péronne, Somme, Picardie, France, son père, Robert I de Peronne de Senlis, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Alix de Flandres, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Gérard de Vermandois I de Heure Lord of Ham en 1079. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1121, à Ham, Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite Marie De Peronne 1056 in Péronne, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert I de Peronne de Senlis 31 und ihre Mutter Alix de Flandres 28. Sie hat 1079 Gérard de Vermandois I de Heure Lord of Ham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1121 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Ham, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite Marie De Peronne è nata il nel 1056 nel Péronne, Somme, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Robert I de Peronne de Senlis, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Alix de Flandres, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Gérard de Vermandois I de Heure Lord of Ham nel 1079. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1121, nel Ham, Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.Péronne, Somme, Picardie, France: フランスピカーディソンメプeロン
ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite Marie De Peronneが1056年にフランスピカーディソンメプeロンで生まれた時，父Robert I de Peronne de Senlisは31歳，母Alix de Flandresは28歳であった。1079年にGérard de Vermandois I de Heure Lord of Hamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1121年にフランスピカーディソンメハムで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite Marie De Peronne(이)가 1056년 프랑스 피카디 솜 pe론에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert I de Peronne de Senlis(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alix de Flandres(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1079년 Gérard de Vermandois I de Heure Lord of Ham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1121년 프랑스 피카디 솜 함에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite Marie De Peronne nasceu em 1056, em Péronne, Somme, Picardie, França, seu pai, Robert I de Peronne de Senlis, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Alix de Flandres, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Gérard de Vermandois I de Heure Lord of Ham em 1079. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1121, em Ham, Somme, Picardie, França, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite Marie De Peronne родилась в 1056 г. в местности пeронн, сомм, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert I de Peronne de Senlis было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Alix de Flandres, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gérard de Vermandois I de Heure Lord of Ham в 1079 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1121 г. в местности хам, сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite Marie De Peronne nació en 1056, en Péronne, Somme, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Robert I de Peronne de Senlis, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Alix de Flandres, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Gérard de Vermandois I de Heure Lord of Ham en 1079. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1121, en Ham, Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 65 años.
